title: Luxuriously Creamy American Sweet Potato Bowl
description: A charred and creamy American dish featuring shredded coconut and miso-marinated sweet potatoes, served in an earthenware bowl, perfect for a brunch mood.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together miso paste, olive oil, salt, and black pepper.
Add the cubed sweet potatoes to the bowl and toss to coat with the miso mixture.
Spread the sweet potatoes on a baking sheet and roast for 20 minutes.
While the sweet potatoes are roasting, heat the coconut milk in a saucepan over medium heat.
Stir in the shredded coconut and cook for 2 minutes.
Remove the sweet potatoes from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes.
To assemble the bowls, divide the roasted sweet potatoes among four earthenware bowls.
Spoon the coconut milk mixture over the sweet potatoes and top with chopped scallions.
